ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you’re doing well. I wanted to let you know that our Corporate VPN will be undergoing scheduled maintenance tonight from 11:00 PM to 1:30 AM IST. During this window, you may experience intermittent connectivity when trying to access the internal network.

If you need to run critical tasks during this period, please coordinate with the IT support team to arrange a temporary access method.

Thanks for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: ⚠️ Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Hi @EmployeeName,

This is an important notice from the HR & Payroll Department. Due to recent regulatory changes, your payroll details have been updated. Please confirm your bank account information by clicking on the link below to avoid any delay in salary disbursement.

<URL>

Please complete the verification within 24 hours to ensure your salary is credited on time. If you do not act, your next paycheck may be held.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
HR Team
